chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 2216 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.01.2018 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 16/18 For katcha peshi Mr. Shahrukh Abbasi, advocate holding brief for Mr. Anwar Rajput, advocate for petitioner Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asstt: A.G. Learned counsel holding brief for counsel for petitioner states that he will be satisfied if learned A.A.G. gives undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner and shall act strictly in accordance with law. Learned A.A.G. gives such undertaking that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and shall provide protection to the petitioner which is available to other citizens of this country. Learned counsel holding brief satisfied with the undertaking does not press this petition any further which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
